posts.title: OMG It's back for real.  WKRP in Cincinnati.  Will play music from the 70s, 70s, and 80s beginning today.  So excited!!!

link_metadata.description: The radio station WKRP isn't dead, and it's now live on air in Cincinnati. The call letters from the fictional station featured decades ago in a CBS sitcom were adopted by stations in the Cincinnati market in time for the Monday morning drive.
